vocab.meaning: sự tự phát không theo khuôn mẫu
vocab.example: My childhood was a whirlwind of unstructured spontaneity, where my friends and I would decide to build a fort on a whim.

vocab.meaning: sự kết nối mang tính bản năng/tổ tiên với thiên nhiên
vocab.example: Catching minnows in the local creek gave me a strange, atavistic connection to nature that I still feel today.

vocab.meaning: một nơi trú ẩn để suy ngẫm
vocab.example: I used to treat the old oak tree in our backyard as a sanctuary for reflection, away from the noise of my siblings.

vocab.meaning: việc lắp ráp/chế tạo cơ khí thô sơ
vocab.example: I spent countless hours engaged in rudimentary engineering, trying to fix my broken bicycle or building soapbox cars.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi nhập vai dựa trên cốt truyện
vocab.example: My favorite activity was narrative-driven role-play, where we would reenact complex scenes from our favorite history books.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác phấn khích gián tiếp (qua quan sát hoặc đọc)
vocab.example: Watching the older kids perform stunts on their skateboards gave me a vicarious thrill, even though I was too scared to try it myself.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò khao khát kiến thức
vocab.example: My obsession with collecting stamps was driven by an epistemic curiosity about the geography and politics of distant lands.
Building elaborate sandcastles at the beach was a fun way to develop my spatial awareness and structural understanding.

vocab.meaning: sự gắn kết giữa các thế hệ
vocab.example: Learning to knit with my grandmother was a cherished activity that facilitated deep intergenerational bonding.
Completing a thousand-piece jigsaw puzzle required a level of prolonged concentration that was quite rare for a child of my age.
